questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What is the notice about?

options.label: A new parking rule on High Street.
A fine for driving too fast.
A change in shop opening hours.

questions.explanation: Thông báo về giới hạn thời gian đỗ xe mới trên phố High.

questions.prompt: What does Megan want Lara to do?

options.label: Wait for a message about the match.
Bring an umbrella to the match.

questions.explanation: Megan sẽ nhắn tin nếu trận đấu bị hủy, vì vậy Lara nên chờ tin nhắn.

questions.prompt: What should you do if you find the cat?

options.label: Call a number or ask at the centre.
Bring it to the owner's house.

questions.explanation: Thông báo yêu cầu gọi số điện thoại hoặc hỏi tại trung tâm cộng đồng.

questions.prompt: What is true about the exhibition?
questions.explanation: Sinh viên có thẻ được vào miễn phí.

questions.prompt: What must staff do?

options.label: Use a different door to enter.

questions.explanation: Lối vào chính đóng cửa, nhân viên phải dùng cửa bên.

questions.prompt: What should volunteers bring?
questions.explanation: Thông báo yêu cầu mang găng tay và nước uống, dụng cụ được cung cấp.

parts.passageSubtitle: Teenagers who make a difference in their communities.

passage.label: Alex
passage.text: I started volunteering at the local animal shelter when I was 14. Every Saturday, I help walk the dogs, clean their kennels and give them food. I've learned a lot about how to care for animals. Some of the dogs are scared when they arrive, but after a few weeks they become more confident. I feel proud when I see them get adopted by loving families. This experience has made me want to become a vet in the future. I also help with fundraising events to buy medicine and toys for the animals.

passage.label: Sophie
passage.text: I've been a volunteer at the city library for two years. I help younger children with their reading every Tuesday and Thursday afternoon. It's amazing to see their progress – some of them couldn't read a full sentence when they started. I also organize storytelling sessions and craft activities during school holidays. I love the atmosphere in the library; it's quiet but full of energy. Volunteering here has improved my communication skills and taught me patience. I even made some new friends among the other volunteers.

passage.label: Liam
passage.text: My volunteer work is with a charity that repairs old bicycles and gives them to people who cannot afford to buy one. We collect broken bikes, fix them and then donate them to refugee families and low-income workers. I spend most of my weekends in the workshop, learning how to mend gears and brakes. It's very practical and I enjoy solving problems. Last month, we gave away 15 bikes. Seeing the smiles on people's faces is the best reward. I'm planning to continue this work even when I start university next year.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Who hopes to have a career connected to their volunteer work?
questions.explanation: Alex muốn trở thành bác sĩ thú y, liên quan đến động vật.

questions.prompt: Who helps people learn a new skill?
questions.explanation: Sophie giúp trẻ em đọc sách – một kỹ năng.

questions.prompt: Who works with mechanical things?
questions.explanation: Liam sửa xe đạp, liên quan đến cơ khí.

questions.prompt: Who feels happy when their work benefits others directly?
questions.explanation: Cả ba đều vui nhưng Liam đặc biệt nhấn mạnh nụ cười của người nhận xe. Tôi chọn C vì câu hỏi directly và câu trả lời rõ nhất.

questions.prompt: Who started volunteering at a younger age?
questions.explanation: Alex bắt đầu năm 14 tuổi, hai người kia không nói rõ tuổi nhưng có vẻ lớn hơn.

questions.prompt: Who works with children outside of school hours?
questions.explanation: Sophie làm việc với trẻ em vào các buổi chiều Thứ Ba và Thứ Năm, và các kỳ nghỉ.

questions.prompt: Who collects and fixes things that people have thrown away?
questions.explanation: Liam thu thập xe đạp cũ và sửa chữa chúng.

parts.passageSubtitle: One family's journey to reduce waste.

passage.text: The Green family decided to reduce their plastic use after watching a documentary about ocean pollution. They were shocked to learn that millions of tons of plastic end up in the sea every year, harming marine life. They knew they couldn't change the world overnight, but they wanted to do their part.

Their first step was to stop buying bottled water. Instead, they bought reusable metal bottles and a water filter. They also started using cloth bags for shopping instead of plastic ones. At the supermarket, they avoided products with excessive packaging, choosing loose fruit and vegetables, and buying bread from the bakery without a plastic wrapper.

The next challenge was the bathroom. They swapped plastic shampoo bottles for solid shampoo bars, and used bamboo toothbrushes instead of plastic ones. They even made their own toothpaste using simple ingredients like baking soda and coconut oil. These changes were not only eco-friendly but also saved them money in the long run.

However, the family admits that it's not always easy. Sometimes they forget to take their reusable bags, or they buy something that comes in plastic because there is no alternative. They say the key is to keep trying and not to feel guilty about small mistakes. They also encourage their friends and neighbours to make small changes too.

After six months, they have reduced their plastic waste by nearly 70%. They feel proud of their progress and are now planning to convince their workplace to install water fountains and recycling bins. Their story has inspired many people in their community to think more carefully about the plastic they use every day.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What made the Green family start reducing plastic?
questions.explanation: Họ xem một bộ phim tài liệu về ô nhiễm đại dương.

questions.prompt: What did the family do to reduce plastic in the kitchen?

options.label: They stopped using plastic bags and bottled water.
They only ate food from the supermarket.

questions.explanation: Họ dùng túi vải và bình nước kim loại, không dùng chai nhựa.

questions.prompt: Which bathroom product did they replace with a homemade version?
questions.explanation: Họ tự làm kem đánh răng từ baking soda và dầu dừa.

questions.prompt: What is the family's attitude when they make mistakes?

options.label: They feel disappointed and stop trying.
They accept it and continue their efforts.
They blame others for their mistakes.

questions.explanation: Họ nói rằng điều quan trọng là tiếp tục cố gắng và không cảm thấy tội lỗi vì những sai lầm nhỏ.

questions.prompt: What is the family planning to do next?

options.label: Encourage their workplace to reduce plastic.

questions.explanation: Họ dự định thuyết phục nơi làm việc lắp đặt bình nước và thùng rác tái chế.

passage.text: The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest coral reef system, located off the coast of Australia. It is (19) ________ up of thousands of individual reefs and islands. The reef is (20) ________ to an incredible variety of marine life, including fish, turtles, and sharks.

Unfortunately, the reef is (21) ________ serious threat from climate change. Rising sea temperatures cause corals to expel the algae that live inside them, a process known as coral bleaching. This weakens the coral and can lead to its death. Scientists warn that (22) ________ actions are not taken, the reef could disappear within our lifetime.

Tourism is a major industry in the area, but it also contributes to the problem. (23) ________, many tour operators are now adopting sustainable practices, such as using sunscreen that is reef-safe and reducing boat pollution. Visitors are encouraged to (24) ________ the reef responsibly by not touching the coral and taking only photographs.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: It is (19) ________ up of thousands of individual reefs and islands.
questions.explanation: made up of = được tạo thành từ.

questions.prompt: The reef is (20) ________ to an incredible variety of marine life.
questions.explanation: be home to = là nơi sinh sống của.

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, the reef is (21) ________ serious threat from climate change.
questions.explanation: under threat = đang bị đe dọa.

questions.prompt: Scientists warn that (22) ________ actions are not taken, the reef could disappear.
questions.explanation: if = nếu (điều kiện).

questions.prompt: (23) ________, many tour operators are now adopting sustainable practices.
questions.explanation: However = tuy nhiên (chuyển ý tương phản).

questions.prompt: Visitors are encouraged to (24) ________ the reef responsibly.
questions.explanation: visit the reef = tham quan rạn san hô.

parts.passageTitle: Letter to a friend about a new hobby

passage.text:
Dear Emma,
I hope you're well. I've started a new hobby – I'm learning to play the guitar! I bought (0) ________ second-hand guitar last week and I've been practising every day.

At first, my fingers really hurt and I couldn't play any chords properly. But now I can play (25) ________ simple songs. I'm taking lessons online and I'm also watching video tutorials. My teacher says I'm improving (26) ________ quickly. I think it's a great way to relax after school.

I've been thinking about joining a band at school, (27) ________ I'm not sure if I'm good enough yet. The music teacher says they need a guitarist for the school concert in June. I might try out (28) ________ I have more confidence.

Do you play any instruments? Maybe we could (29) ________ together sometime – you could bring your keyboard. It would be so much fun! Let (30) ________ know if you're interested.

Write back soon,
Tom

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, write the correct answer. Write ONE word for each gap.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: some simple songs = một vài bài hát đơn giản.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: quite quickly = khá nhanh.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: but = nhưng (tương phản).

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: when I have more confidence = khi tôi tự tin hơn.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: play together = chơi cùng nhau.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: let me know = cho tôi biết.
